introSection: Thriller was a wooden side friction roller coaster built by Butlin's previously located at Butlin's Littlehampton in Littlehampton, West Sussex, England, UK. It was scrapped in early 1962.
fullText: Thriller was a wooden side friction roller coaster built by Butlin's previously located at Butlin's Littlehampton in Littlehampton, West Sussex, England, UK. It was scrapped in early 1962.
